candidates.why: Clearly labeled as Total Revenue and matches definition of top-line sales.
Explicitly labeled non-revenue; should not be used as top-line.
Subtotal combining Materials Purchased and inventory change; less preferred than its components per instructions.
Component of cost of sales; together with Inventories reconciliation forms Raw material and energy expense. Prefer component over subtotal for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Raw material and energy expense - others
candidates.why: Label suggests a subcomponent but appears unused (all nan); less clear than Materials Purchased.

candidates.row_label: Unrealized derivative effects on power and raw material contracts
candidates.why: These are derivative fair value effects, not core COGS, despite relation to raw materials.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense; not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: Materials Purchased plus Inventories reconcile exactly to Raw material and energy expense, confirming it is the core COGS component.

candidates.why: Represents operating income items, not pure SG&A expense; less aligned but one of limited candidates.
Combined operating income and expense bucket; best available proxy for SG&A-type overhead among candidates.
Similar combined operating income/expense bucket; appears to be another SG&A-like category, though values not shown here.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line in candidates; using the combined Other Operating Income/Expense buckets as best proxies for overhead, excluding any totals/subtotals.

candidates.why: Explicit research and development expense line with values; matches target variable definition.
Capitalized R&D, not the expense; not primary choice for XRD.
Alternative labeling but appears with nan values; secondary to the populated R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset; not an R&D expense line.
Aggregate/catch-all but appears empty; less direct than the main Research & Development expense row.
Generic finance expense line; good proxy but more aggregate than pure interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Represents profit allocation, not interest cost.
Same as non-controlling interests, not interest expense.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not XINT.
Generic label but appears as structural/empty line; more precise derived interest lines exist.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on leases only; component of total interest expense.
Non-lease portion of interest; component of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most comprehensive recurring interest cost line, net of capitalized amounts; best representation of interest expense.
Interest capitalized to assets, not period expense; should not be primary XINT.
Interest component of pension; subcomponent of finance costs.
Duplicate/variant of capitalized interest; not main expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Bank loans and other interest-bearing short-term debt
candidates.why: Debt balance sheet item, not interest expense.
Debt balance sheet item, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest.
Equity, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

candidates.row_label: Share of the profit (loss) in equity acc
candidates.why: Income statement share of profit from equity-accounted investees; not a stock equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Share of the profit (loss) in equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Same nature as above; not book equity.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of remeasurement postemployement benefits of equity accounted investments, net of tax
candidates.why: OCI component; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of items that will be reclassified to income statement of equity accounted investments, net of tax
candidates.why: OCI component; not total equity.
Income statement equity-method line; not balance sheet equity.
Same as above; not BE.

candidates.row_label: Impairment charges (PP&E and equity accounted invest)
candidates.why: Impairment expense; not equity.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using the equity method
candidates.why: Asset for equity-method investments, not shareholders' equity.
Component of equity, but not total book equity.
Represents parent shareholders' equity; good measure of book equity, but excludes non-controlling interests.
Explicit total equity including non-controlling interests; matches definition of book/total equity.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Flow measure of minority interest in profit; good for income-based MIB but not stock.
Appears to mirror net income attributable to non-controlling interests; also a flow.
Balance sheet line for minority equity; appropriate stock measure of MIB.
Balance sheet minority interest line; equivalent to non-controlling interests and clearly a stock MIB measure.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow to minorities; not stock amount.
